reasoning: Your main limiter is lactate clearance and low fatigue resistance, which is seen in the rapid drop from your 5-min to 20-min power. Your last ride at 60% FTP shows your aerobic base needs development. This workout will prepare you for the sustained efforts of the Alpine Loop by training lactate clearance.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: 3 sets of 12 mins: 4 mins at 242-256W, 4 mins at 201-218W, 4 mins at 242-256W

weekly_focus: This week: progressive loading — keep attacking the lactate clearance gap.
